text: Here, in this brightly lit, sharply modern space, I feel a blend of anticipation and curiosity. There’s a sterility that suggests newness or preparation—perhaps for a meeting or an exhibition. The glass walls distance me from what is inside, creating a separation between observer and participant. It evokes in me an awareness of boundaries—both physical and conceptual—as if I should decide whether to step forward or remain outside, contemplating the nature of entry.
